# BUG-003: [Dashboard] Tooltip truncated in German locale

## Severity: Low

## Summary
Dashboard chart tooltips are truncated when the locale is set to German (de-DE). The tooltip container has a fixed width that does not accommodate longer German translations.

**URL:** https://example.com/dashboard?locale=de-DE

## Expected Behavior
Tooltips should expand or wrap to display the full translated text regardless of locale.

## Actual Behavior
German tooltip text like "Gesamtumsatz der letzten 30 Tage" is cut off to "Gesamtumsatz der le..." with no ellipsis or wrap.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Navigate to https://example.com/dashboard
2. Change locale to German (de-DE) via settings
3. Hover over any chart data point
4. Observe: tooltip text is truncated

## Business Impact
- **Revenue impact:** None
- **Trust impact:** Low -- German-speaking users may find the interface unprofessional
- **Regulatory risk:** None
- **Data risk:** None
- **Scale:** Affects all German-locale users viewing dashboard charts

## Evidence
- Screenshot: screenshots/bug-003-tooltip-truncated.png
- Console errors: None
